headerDisplay: Enter your Mitsubishi **Wi-Fi Control** app credentials to discover your units.

password.title: User Password
password.description: Password used on your Mitsubishi Wi-Fi Control app

dry.title: Enable Dry Mode (experimental)
dry.description: Adds a Dehumidifier service for units that support dry mode.

fanMode.title: Enable Fan-Only Mode
fanMode.description: Adds a Fan service that lets you run the unit in fan-only mode without heating or cooling. This service is also added automatically when fanSpeed is enabled.

swingMode.title: Enable Vertical Airflow Swing
swingMode.description: Adds vertical airflow swing control to the main AC tile on supported models. Some units may reject swing commands during power transitions; if this affects tile toggling, leave disabled and set swing to 'Auto' on your physical remote.

airflowH.title: Enable Horizontal Airflow Swing
airflowH.description: Adds horizontal airflow swing control on supported models (ON = sweep, OFF = centre). Horizontal swing is not supported by many Mitsubishi units.

fanSpeed.title: Enable Fan Speed Control (experimental)
fanSpeed.description: Exposes a fan speed slider (Auto / Low / Medium / High) on a separate Fan service (added automatically) and keeps the main AC tile cleaner by default.

fanSpeedOnMainTile.title: Show Fan Speed on Main AC Tile (advanced)
fanSpeedOnMainTile.description: When fanSpeed is enabled, also exposes fan speed on the main Air Conditioner tile. Leave disabled for best reliability.

outdoorTemp.title: Enable Outdoor Temperature Sensor
outdoorTemp.description: Adds a Temperature Sensor accessory showing the outdoor unit temperature (when reported by the unit).

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often to refresh each unit state from Melview. Lower values are more responsive but increase API traffic.

perUnitOverrides.title: Per-Unit Overrides
perUnitOverrides.description: Override options for specific units by unitId.

fanSpeedOnMainTile.title: Show Fan Speed on Main AC Tile
